title: Comment on: "Coherent perfect absorption: Zero reflection without linewidth suppression"
summary: A recent paper, Phys. Rev. Research 8, 013261 (2026), claims that the polaromechanical normal-mode splitting (NMS) measured in Nat. Commun. 16, 5652 (2025) is not true based on their two results: $i$) there is no true splitting in the linear-scale spectrum; $ii$) the total or intrinsic decay rate of the cavity-magnon polariton, set by the imaginary part of the pole of the total output spectrum, remains unchanged under the coherent-perfect-absorption (CPA) condition. In this comment, we indicate that $i$) there is NMS in both the linear and logarithmic scales of our spectra in {\it a narrow frequency range} around the CPA frequency; $ii$) the total decay rate defined via the {\it pole} of the spectrum cannot characterize the vanishing {\it effective} decay rate at the CPA frequency (known as the monochromaticity of the CPA), and thus this parameter is irrelevant to the NMS measured in our experiment in {\it a narrow frequency range} around the CPA frequency. Consequently, their results above are either false or irrelevant, and thus cannot support their claim on the polaromechanical strong coupling measured in our experiment.

AI.tldr: 该评论文章反驳了另一篇论文关于极子机械正常模式分裂（NMS）不存在的说法，指出对方基于线性谱无分裂和总衰减率不变的结论是错误的或不相关的。
AI.motivation: 回应Phys. Rev. Research 8, 013261 (2026)论文对Nat. Commun. 16, 5652 (2025)中极子机械强耦合测量的质疑，该质疑声称实验中观察到的正常模式分裂不是真实的。
AI.method: 通过理论分析指出：1）在CPA频率附近的窄频率范围内，线性谱和log谱中都存在NMS；2）基于谱极点的总衰减率定义无法表征CPA频率处消失的有效衰减率（CPA的单色性），因此该参数与实验中测量的NMS无关。
AI.result: 证明对方论文的两个结果要么是错误的（关于谱中无分裂的结论），要么是不相关的（关于总衰减率不变的结论），因此无法支持其对极子机械强耦合测量的质疑。
AI.conclusion: 对方论文的结论无法否定实验中观察到的极子机械正常模式分裂和强耦合现象，原实验测量结果仍然有效。

title: In-plane magnetic response and Maki parameter of alternating-twist multilayers
summary: We analytically study the orbital response of alternating-twist graphene systems with four and five layers to an in-plane magnetic field, using the unitary transformation introduced by Khalaf et al. (Phys. Rev. B 100, 085109 (2019)). This transformation maps an alternating-twist N-layer system onto N/2 decoupled twisted bilayer graphene (TBG) systems with distinct effective twist angles, together with a single decoupled layer for odd N, thereby generating a hierarchy of N/2 magic angles. For five layers, we find that the orbital in-plane magnetic response is negligibly small, and we expect this property to hold for all systems with an odd number of layers. For a tetralayer system, we approximately express the in-plane orbital susceptibility in terms of the corresponding TBG responses, which are large compared to the spin susceptibility and even diverge in the clean limit at charge neutrality near the magic angle. Remarkably, the in-plane magnetic response is strongly angle dependent: compared with TBG, it is about 0.01 times smaller at the first magic angle, whereas at the second it reaches about 3.6 times the value of magic angle TBG. We finally introduce the in-plane Maki parameter as the ratio between the difference in orbital susceptibility of the normal and superconducting states and the paramagnetic Pauli susceptibility. For TBG, we find values up to 2 near the magic angle. Our analysis can be extended to other response functions and suggests that the different effective magic angles in alternating-twist multilayers may host distinct superconducting phases.

AI.tldr: 研究交替扭转多层石墨烯在面内磁场下的轨道响应，发现奇数层系统响应可忽略，四层系统响应强烈依赖于扭转角，并在第二魔角处达到最大值。
AI.motivation: 研究交替扭转多层石墨烯系统的轨道磁响应特性，探索不同层数和扭转角对磁响应的影响，为理解这些系统中的超导相提供理论基础。
AI.method: 使用Khalaf等人提出的幺正变换方法，将交替扭转N层系统映射为N/2个解耦的扭转双层石墨烯系统，每个具有不同的有效扭转角，奇数层时还有一个解耦的单层。
AI.result: 五层系统的轨道面内磁响应可忽略，预计所有奇数层系统都有此特性。四层系统的轨道磁化率强烈依赖于扭转角：在第一魔角处比TBG小约0.01倍，在第二魔角处达到TBG的3.6倍。TBG的面内Maki参数在魔角附近可达2。
AI.conclusion: 交替扭转多层石墨烯的轨道磁响应具有奇偶层数依赖性和强烈的扭转角依赖性，不同有效魔角可能承载不同的超导相，分析方法可扩展到其他响应函数。

title: Topological superconductivity of a two-dimensional electron gas at the (001) LaAlO\textsubscript{3}/SrTiO\textsubscript{3} interface
summary: We investigate the emergence of topological superconductivity and Majorana zero modes in the two-dimensional electron gas formed at the LaAlO$_3$/SrTiO$_3$ (001) interface. Using a realistic multiband tight binding model that incorporates the $t_{2g}$ orbital structure together with atomic and Rashba spin-orbit couplings, we determine the topological phase diagrams for both fully two-dimensional and quasi-one-dimensional geometries. In the two-dimensional limit, we show that a finite out-of-plane magnetic-field component is required to drive a topological phase transition. In this case, the critical field is strongly band dependent, and for higher-lying bands, it is controlled by the interplay of spin and orbital Zeeman effects, as well as atomic spin-orbit coupling. Although a purely in-plane field is insufficient to induce the topological transition in a full 2D system, we demonstrate that a lateral confinement relaxes this constraint. In this case, the character of the edge modes depends sensitively on the field orientation, with out-of-plane fields producing conventional counterpropagating chiral modes and transverse in-plane fields giving rise to co-propagating antichiral modes. Finally, Majorana zero modes in LAO/STO nanowires with varying widths are analyzed. We demonstrate that subbands predominantly composed of $d_{yz/xz}$ orbitals exhibit exceptionally long localization lengths, which may preclude the observation of Majorana bound states in nanowires of typical experimental dimensions.

AI.tldr: 研究LaAlO₃/SrTiO₃界面二维电子气中拓扑超导性和马约拉纳零模的出现，分析不同磁场方向和几何约束下的拓扑相变特性。
AI.motivation: 探索在LaAlO₃/SrTiO₃界面二维电子气中实现拓扑超导和马约拉纳零模的可能性，这对于量子计算应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 采用包含t₂g轨道结构、原子自旋轨道耦合和Rashba自旋轨道耦合的多带紧束缚模型，分析二维和准一维几何结构下的拓扑相图。
AI.result: 二维系统中需要垂直磁场分量才能驱动拓扑相变；横向约束可放宽这一要求；d_{yz/xz}轨道主导的子带马约拉纳零模局域化长度异常长，可能影响实验观测。
AI.conclusion: LAO/STO界面系统在特定条件下可实现拓扑超导态，但马约拉纳零模的长局域化长度可能对实验观测构成挑战，需要优化系统参数和几何结构。

title: Extended saddle points govern long-lived antiskyrmions
summary: Achieving long-lived nanoscale magnetic solitons remains a central challenge, as their lifetimes typically decrease rapidly with temperature. Here, we demonstrate that anisotropic Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interaction (aDMI) enables spatially extended saddle points (SPs) that fundamentally alter thermally activated decay. In contrast to conventional localized SPs, these extended configurations completely suppress the entropic contribution to the activation rate, rendering the lifetimes effectively temperature independent. To establish this mechanism, we develop a first-principles method based on spin spirals to compute DMI beyond the isotropic approximation, resolving its full directional dependence for arbitrary nearest neighbors. We apply this method to oxidized Fe$_3$GeTe$_2$ (FGT-O), an experimentally accessible van der Waals magnet. Oxygen adsorption simultaneously breaks inversion symmetry and lowers the in-plane crystalline symmetry, thereby generating a sizable aDMI. We demonstrate that aDMI stabilizes nanoscale antiskyrmions with energy barriers exceeding 120 meV at low external magnetic fields. Crucially, extended SPs enhance the lifetime in FGT-O by more than five orders of magnitude at room temperature compared to conventional ultrathin-film skyrmion systems. We further show that aDMI is not the only route to such extended SPs and identify the general conditions under which they emerge, establishing a general route to soliton decay pathways with temperature-independent prefactors. Our results uncover a new paradigm for enhancing soliton stability through transition-state geometry rather than energy-barrier height.

AI.tldr: 各向异性DMI产生空间扩展的鞍点，抑制熵贡献，使磁孤子寿命基本与温度无关，在室温下比传统系统提高5个数量级
AI.motivation: 纳米尺度磁孤子寿命随温度升高急剧下降是核心挑战，需要寻找新机制来增强其热稳定性
AI.method: 开发基于自旋螺旋的第一性原理方法计算全方向依赖的DMI；应用于氧化Fe3GeTe2，分析各向异性DMI对反斯格明子的稳定作用
AI.result: 各向异性DMI产生扩展鞍点，完全抑制活化速率中的熵贡献，使寿命与温度无关；在FGT-O中实现120 meV能量势垒，室温寿命比传统系统提高5个数量级
AI.conclusion: 各向异性DMI通过改变过渡态几何而非仅提高能量势垒，为增强磁孤子稳定性提供了新范式，建立了温度无关衰减路径的通用条件

title: Removing nodal and support-mismatch pathologies in Variational Monte Carlo via blurred sampling
summary: Variational Monte Carlo (VMC) is a powerful and fast-growing method for optimizing and evolving parameterized many-body wave functions, especially with modern neural-network quantum states. In practice, however, the stochastic estimators that form the backbone of the method can become unstable or biased due to the presence of nodes, a ubiquitous feature of quantum wave functions. In the continuum, this results in heavy-tailed estimators with potentially divergent variances, while in discrete Hilbert spaces the sampling distribution can miss parts of the support needed to form unbiased estimators. These statistical pathologies lead to unreliable optimization trajectories in stochastic reconfiguration or incorrect variational dynamics in time-dependent Variational Monte Carlo (t-VMC), and severely limit the power of the numerical simulations. We introduce blurred sampling to address these difficulties. The method has a number of rigorous properties that make it well-behaved, effective and efficient. Additionally it is a post-processing approach that can be used without modifying the underlying sampler and incurs only minimal overhead. We demonstrate its effectiveness on several representative examples where standard sampling approaches are known to fail, and apply it to large-scale problems in spin dynamics. This work establishes a broadly applicable framework for robust VMC and t-VMC calculations.

AI.tldr: 提出模糊采样方法解决变分蒙特卡洛中由于波函数节点导致的统计病理问题，提高VMC和t-VMC计算的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 变分蒙特卡洛方法中的随机估计器由于量子波函数节点的存在会变得不稳定或有偏，导致重尾分布、方差发散或采样分布不完整，严重影响优化轨迹和变分动力学的可靠性
AI.method: 提出模糊采样方法，这是一种后处理技术，无需修改底层采样器，通过处理采样分布来避免节点带来的统计病理问题
AI.result: 在多个标准采样方法已知会失效的代表性示例中证明了模糊采样的有效性，并将其应用于大规模自旋动力学问题
AI.conclusion: 建立了一个广泛适用的鲁棒VMC和t-VMC计算框架，解决了长期存在的统计病理问题

title: Stationary $1/f^α$ noise in discrete models of the Kardar-Parisi-Zhang class
summary: In discrete models describing growing rough interfaces of the Kardar-Parisi-Zhang universality class, we examine height fluctuations at a fixed site as a function of time in the monolayer unit. For small systems, we show that it is possible to reach the stationary state. We compute the two-time autocorrelation and power spectra independently. The correlation function remains non-exponential and vanishes after a correlation time that diverges with system size. As a result, the power spectra display a lower cutoff that maintains constant power. In the nontrivial frequency regime, we observe $1/f^α$-type scaling with the spectral exponent 5/3. Finite-size scaling reveals that the temporal correlation function follows a dynamic scaling. Our findings, supported by scaling-theoretical arguments, establish that the fluctuations are wide-sense stationary, implying applicability of the Wiener-Khinchin theorem.

AI.tldr: 研究KPZ普适类离散模型中单层单元固定位置高度涨落的时间演化，发现小系统可达到稳态，计算了两时间自相关函数和功率谱，揭示了非指数衰减的相关函数和5/3谱指数的1/f^α型标度行为。
AI.motivation: 研究KPZ普适类离散模型中固定位置高度涨落的时间特性，特别是在小系统中达到稳态的可能性，以及相关函数和功率谱的标度行为。
AI.method: 通过离散模型研究KPZ普适类粗糙界面生长，分析单层单元中固定位置的高度涨落，计算两时间自相关函数和功率谱，进行有限尺寸标度分析。
AI.result: 小系统可达到稳态；相关函数呈非指数衰减，相关时间随系统尺寸发散；功率谱在低频有截止但保持恒定功率，在非平凡频率区显示5/3谱指数的1/f^α型标度；时间相关函数遵循动态标度律。
AI.conclusion: 涨落是宽平稳的，满足Wiener-Khinchin定理的适用条件，建立了KPZ普适类离散模型中固定位置高度涨落的时间标度特性。

title: Spin-Flip Configuration Interaction for Strong Static Correlation in Quantum Electrodynamics
summary: In computational chemistry of molecular materials, strong static correlation effects appear when electronic states, often involving the ground state, become quasi-degenerate, as occurs, for example, in bond-breaking processes. Such situations present significant challenges for accurate theoretical treatment. In these regimes, many-body methods involving a single-determinant description, such as Hartree-Fock theory and its time-dependent extension, fail to reproduce the correct topology of the ground and excited state potential energy surfaces (e.g., near conical intersections). When strongly correlated electronic systems are further strongly coupled to a quantized radiation field within the framework of non-relativistic cavity quantum electrodynamics, an additional photonic degree of freedom introduces both new complexity and new opportunities to control. Excited cavity photons can modify bond-breaking processes and enable tunability of geometrical and spin-phase transitions, for instance, in organometallic complexes. To overcome this bottleneck, in this work, we extend the well-studied spin-flip configuration interaction singles (SF-CIS) approach to explicitly include quantized cavity photons leading to QED-SF-CIS method. We derive the spin-flip Hamiltonian and find that the double excitation subspace of the system (single with respect to electronic excitation) must be included in the configurations to properly describe singlet electronic states interacting with cavity photons. We then illustrate, through representative molecular examples, how cavity coupling can provide additional tunability in bond-breaking processes. We finally generalize this approach to include higher numbers of photonic excitations, which are required in the strong coupling regime.

AI.tldr: 将自旋翻转构型相互作用单激发方法扩展到包含量子化腔光子，提出QED-SF-CIS方法，用于处理强静态关联分子材料与量子化辐射场的耦合问题。
AI.motivation: 分子材料中的强静态关联效应（如键断裂过程）对理论处理构成挑战，传统单行列式方法无法准确描述势能面拓扑。当这些强关联系统进一步与量子化辐射场强耦合时，光子自由度既增加了复杂性，也提供了新的调控机会。
AI.method: 扩展自旋翻转构型相互作用单激发方法，显式包含量子化腔光子，提出QED-SF-CIS方法。推导自旋翻转哈密顿量，发现需要包含系统的双激发子空间（相对于电子激发的单激发）来正确描述与腔光子相互作用的单重态电子态。
AI.result: 通过代表性分子示例说明腔耦合如何为键断裂过程提供额外的可调性。进一步推广该方法以包含更高数量的光子激发，这在强耦合区域是必需的。
AI.conclusion: QED-SF-CIS方法成功将自旋翻转方法扩展到腔量子电动力学框架，为处理强关联分子系统与量子化辐射场的耦合提供了有效工具，展示了腔耦合在调控化学过程（如键断裂）中的潜力。

title: Lightweight phase-field surrogate for modelling ductile-to-brittle transition through phenomenological elastoplastic coupling
summary: The ductile-to-brittle transition (DBT) in body-centred cubic systems is a central design constraint for cryogenic structures. Performing parametric studies to enhance the understanding on DBT using fully coupled thermomechanical continuum DBT models is computationally expensive. Therefore, in this work, a lightweight phase-field surrogate is proposed. This surrogate approach captures key \emph{DBT-like} trends within a standard isothermal two-field (displacement--damage) setting by prescribing temperature dependence through three phenomenological mechanisms: (i) a temperature-dependent degradation exponent $n(T)$ that sharpens stiffness loss from gradual (ductile-like, $n=2.0$ at 293\,K) to abrupt (brittle-like, $n=3.5$ at 77\,K), (ii) temperature-dependent yield stress and elastic modulus to modulate the balance between plastic dissipation and elastic energy storage, and (iii) an effective fracture toughness and driving-force scaling to represent reduced crack-tip shielding at cryogenic temperatures. The model is implemented in FEniCSx using small-strain $J_2$ return mapping and a staggered solution scheme. Simulations of a single-edge-notched specimen over 77--293\,K demonstrate a systematic progression from brittle-like to ductile-like response, characterised by reduced displacement to unstable fracture, a transition from abrupt post-peak load drop to extended softening, and a shift from narrow, localised damage bands with confined plasticity to broader process zones. A sensitivity study comparing four interpolation schemes (linear, smoothstep, exponential, hybrid) shows that the qualitative transition trends are robust, with interpolation primarily affecting intermediate-temperature responses while endpoint behaviours remain unchanged.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级相场代理模型，通过温度依赖机制模拟体心立方材料脆韧转变趋势，避免昂贵的热力学耦合计算
AI.motivation: 体心立方材料的脆韧转变是低温结构设计的关键约束，但使用完全耦合热力学连续介质模型进行参数研究计算成本高昂
AI.method: 采用轻量级相场代理模型，在标准等温双场（位移-损伤）框架中通过三个唯象机制引入温度依赖性：温度依赖的降解指数、温度依赖的屈服应力和弹性模量、有效断裂韧性和驱动力缩放
AI.result: 单边缺口试样在77-293K范围内的模拟显示从脆性到韧性响应的系统性转变，四种插值方案的敏感性研究表明定性转变趋势具有鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: 该轻量级代理模型能有效捕捉脆韧转变的关键趋势，为低温材料设计提供计算高效的替代方案

title: Light induced magnetization in d-wave superconductors
summary: We develop a microscopic theory of the inverse Faraday effect in d-wave superconductors. An extended version of the Keldysh-Nambu quasiclassical formalism is used to compute the dc-component of the current density induced by an external monochromatic radiation. Our work explicitly demonstrates how branch population imbalance produces nonvanishing nonlinear and nonlocal dc-response. We evaluate the magnitude of the induced current and obtain estimates for the induced static magnetization. Experimental implications of our theory and future extensions of our work are briefly discussed.

AI.tldr: 开发了d波超导体中逆法拉第效应的微观理论，使用扩展的Keldysh-Nambu准经典形式计算了由外部单色辐射诱导的直流电流密度，解释了分支布居不平衡如何产生非零的非线性和非局域直流响应。
AI.motivation: 研究d波超导体中的逆法拉第效应，理解分支布居不平衡如何产生非线性非局域直流响应，为实验观测提供理论框架。
AI.method: 使用扩展的Keldysh-Nambu准经典形式，计算外部单色辐射诱导的直流电流密度分量。
AI.result: 明确展示了分支布居不平衡产生非零非线性非局域直流响应的机制，估算了诱导电流的大小和静态磁化强度。
AI.conclusion: 建立了d波超导体逆法拉第效应的微观理论，为实验提供了理论预测，并讨论了未来工作的扩展方向。

title: Time reversal reserved spin valve and spin transistor based on unconventional $p$-wave magnets
summary: The anisotropic spin splitting in unconventional magnets opens new opportunities for realizing spintronic functionalities without relying on net magnetization or relativistic spin-orbit coupling. Here, we propose a spin valve and a spin transistor based on unconventional $p$-wave magnets (UPMs). The spin valve is realized in a junction where a normal metal is sandwiched between two UPMs whose exchange-field strength vectors are oriented transverse to the junction direction. The conductance of such a device is governed by the spin alignment between two UPMs: when their strength vectors are parallel, the spin-state alignment enables efficient electron transmission, leading to a high-conductance state; in contrast, the antiparallel configuration suppresses the conductance owing to the opposite spin orientations. Furthermore, the spin-valve can be extended to a spin transistor by replacing the central normal metal with another UPM with a longitudinally oriented strength vector and a perpendicular spin polarization axis. The central UPM enables uniform spin precession with the same precession frequency for all transverse modes. Both devices can be electrically controlled by modulating the strength vectors of UPMs. These findings establish UPMs as a promising platform for developing spintronic devices without net magnetization or relativistic spin-orbit coupling.

AI.tldr: 提出基于非常规p波磁体的自旋阀和自旋晶体管，无需净磁化或相对论自旋轨道耦合即可实现电控自旋电子功能
AI.motivation: 非常规磁体中的各向异性自旋分裂为无需净磁化或相对论自旋轨道耦合的自旋电子器件提供了新机会
AI.method: 设计基于非常规p波磁体的自旋阀和自旋晶体管结构。自旋阀由两个横向取向交换场强度矢量的UPM夹着正常金属组成；自旋晶体管将中心正常金属替换为纵向取向且具有垂直自旋极化轴的UPM
AI.result: 自旋阀的电导由两个UPM的自旋对齐控制：平行时高电导，反平行时低电导。自旋晶体管可实现所有横向模式的均匀自旋进动。两种器件均可通过调制UPM的强度矢量进行电控
AI.conclusion: 非常规p波磁体为开发无需净磁化或相对论自旋轨道耦合的自旋电子器件提供了有前景的平台

title: Quasiparticle dynamics and hydrodynamics of 1d hard rod gas on diffusion scale
summary: We investigate the stochastic dynamics of a quasiparticle within a gas of hard rods, focusing on the evolution of its mean, variance, and autocorrelation for two choices of initial states: (i) one with long-range (LR) correlations and (ii) the other without it. We derive analytical results for the phase space density correlations in the former case to complement the known results for the latter case. These results enable us to obtain expressions for the mean, variance, and autocorrelation of a quasiparticle, which are applicable to both initial states. The LR correlations introduce a diffusive-scale correction to the mean Euler generalized hydrodynamic (GHD) equations, modifying the standard local equilibrium form, and our findings reveal that the form of the correction term depends on the LR correlations present in the initial state.

AI.tldr: 研究硬棒气体中准粒子的随机动力学，分析两种初始状态（有/无长程关联）下均值、方差和自相关的演化，发现长程关联会引入扩散尺度修正到欧拉广义流体动力学方程。
AI.motivation: 研究硬棒气体中准粒子的随机动力学，特别关注初始状态中长程关联对动力学行为的影响。现有的研究主要关注无长程关联的初始状态，需要补充有长程关联情况下的分析，以全面理解准粒子的统计特性演化。
AI.method: 针对两种初始状态（有长程关联和无长程关联），推导相空间密度关联的解析结果。基于这些结果，获得准粒子的均值、方差和自相关表达式。分析长程关联如何修正欧拉广义流体动力学方程。
AI.result: 获得了适用于两种初始状态的准粒子均值、方差和自相关表达式。发现长程关联会引入扩散尺度修正到欧拉广义流体动力学方程，修正项的形式取决于初始状态中的长程关联特性，改变了标准局部平衡形式。
AI.conclusion: 初始状态中的长程关联对硬棒气体中准粒子的随机动力学有重要影响，会引入扩散尺度的修正到广义流体动力学方程中。这种修正改变了系统的标准局部平衡行为，表明初始关联对后续动力学演化具有持续影响。

title: sbml4md: A computational platform for System-Bath Modeling via Molecular Dynamics powered by Machine Learning
comment: Special Topic, Ultrafast Spectroscopy and Dynamics
summary: We introduce sbml4md, a newly developed algorithm implemented as a software package to extract parameters of multimode anharmonic Brownian (MAB) models from molecular dynamics (MD) trajectories for simulating nonlinear vibrational spectra of intramolecular modes of molecular liquids. By leveraging machine learning (ML) techniques to capture vibrational anharmonicity, intermolecular couplings, and bath correlation functions for each mode, sbml4md obviates empirical fitting and enables the modeling of environments with spatial and temporal heterogeneity. This work provides a set of parameters specifically tailored for the Hierarchical Equations of Motion (HEOM) framework, enabling numerically "exact" simulations of nonlinear vibrational spectra. Building upon our previous implementation for intramolecular vibrational modes [Park, Jo, and Tanimura, J. Chem. Phys. 163, 214104 (2025)], the present code enhances optimization efficiency by explicitly accounting for intermolecular vibrational contributions. This extension enables sbml4md to broaden the applicability of HEOM-based dynamical modeling by seamlessly integrating classical MD approaches, thereby providing a flexible and scalable framework for simulating both linear and nonlinear spectra under realistic conditions with minimal empirical input. The accompanying ML code, written in Python, is provided as supporting material.

AI.tldr: 开发了sbml4md算法，通过机器学习从分子动力学轨迹提取多模非谐布朗模型参数，用于模拟分子液体非线性振动光谱，无需经验拟合。
AI.motivation: 需要一种能够从分子动力学轨迹中提取参数的方法，用于模拟分子液体的非线性振动光谱，避免经验拟合，并能处理空间和时间异质性环境。
AI.method: 开发sbml4md算法，利用机器学习技术捕捉振动非谐性、分子间耦合和浴相关函数，为HEOM框架提供参数，通过显式考虑分子间振动贡献提高优化效率。
AI.result: 提供了专门为HEOM框架定制的参数集，能够进行数值"精确"的非线性振动光谱模拟，扩展了HEOM动力学建模的适用性，实现了经典MD方法的无缝集成。
AI.conclusion: sbml4md提供了一个灵活可扩展的框架，能够在最小经验输入下模拟现实条件下的线性和非线性光谱，Python代码已作为支持材料提供。

title: Polarization Dynamics in Ferroelectrics: Insights Enabled by Machine Learning Molecular Dynamics
summary: Ferroelectric materials with switchable spontaneous polarization underpin non-volatile memories, transistors, sensors, and emerging neuromorphic chips. Their performance and stability are governed by polarization dynamics and domain kinetics, making a microscopic understanding of these processes and precise atomic level control of polarization domains key challenges for next-generation ferroelectric electronics. Due to the limitations of the characterization technology with atomic level in experiment, high precision atomic simulations become important. First principles calculations are inherently limited in accessible length and time scales, making it difficult to capture the complex features of dynamic processes. Machine learning molecular dynamics (MLMD) offers a compelling solution by encoding quantum-mechanical accuracy into force fields, thereby enabling large scale dynamic simulations with near first-principles fidelity. This Perspective highlights the advantages of MLMD for simulating polarization switching, domain nucleation and migration, topological polar textures and curvature-driven ferroelectric phenomena, while providing a systematic overview of recent progress in these areas. We further discuss methodological challenges that limit predictive capability, including long range electrostatics, coupled lattice-spin degrees of freedom in multiferroics, and data efficient pre-training of large atomistic models. Corresponding advances in long range aware force fields, spin dependent machine learning models, and large scale pretraining are expected to move MLMD toward a genuinely predictive framework for the design of ferroelectric and multiferroic materials.

AI.tldr: 机器学习分子动力学为铁电材料极化动力学模拟提供量子精度，克服传统方法尺度限制，推动铁电材料设计
AI.motivation: 铁电材料的性能取决于极化动力学和畴运动，但实验表征技术有限，第一性原理计算受限于时空尺度，需要新方法实现原子级精确的大尺度动态模拟
AI.method: 采用机器学习分子动力学方法，将量子力学精度编码到力场中，实现接近第一性原理精度的大尺度动态模拟，应用于极化翻转、畴成核迁移、拓扑极化和曲率驱动现象
AI.result: MLMD成功模拟了铁电材料的动态过程，为理解极化动力学提供了新工具，但仍面临长程静电、自旋-晶格耦合等挑战
AI.conclusion: 通过发展长程感知力场、自旋相关机器学习模型和大规模预训练，MLMD有望成为铁电和多铁材料设计的真正预测性框架

title: Ultrafast dynamics and light-induced superconductivity from first principles
summary: Experiments on superconducting materials have unveiled unique emergent properties when they are driven far from equilibrium. However, a quantitative first-principles treatment that describes experimental observations is lacking. In this work, we develop an ab-initio model for the nonequilibrium response of optically irradiated superconducting films within the framework of conventional electron-phonon-mediated superconductivity, leveraging new numerical techniques to solve the Migdal-Eliashberg equations directly on the real-frequency axis. This enables us to quantitatively reproduce the optical response of superconducting films in pump-probe experiments and validate our approach on measurements of the differential reflectance of Pb and LaH$_{10}$ in response to a pump excitation. Similar calculations performed on the alkali-doped fulleride K$_3$C$_{60}$ reveal that a photo-induced superconducting state is generated after irradiation by an ultrafast mid-infrared pulse of sufficient intensity, as reported in prior experimental work. The enhancement in this framework is attributed to the excitation of quasiparticles to energies resonant with the strongest electron-phonon coupling in K$_3$C$_{60}$, in close analogy to the mechanism for enhancement of superconductivity under microwave irradiation, explaining the nature of the photo-induced superconducting state and elucidating the subsequent quasiparticle and phonon dynamics. Our results suggest that photo-induced superconductivity is accessible in more materials than previously recognized. We demonstrate this by performing calculations on calcium-intercalated graphite, CaC$_6$, and predict a similar photo-induced superconducting gap.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于第一性原理的非平衡超导响应模型，能够定量描述光泵浦实验中超导薄膜的光学响应，预测了更多材料中可实现光诱导超导
AI.motivation: 实验发现超导材料在远离平衡态时表现出独特性质，但缺乏定量描述实验观测的第一性原理处理方法
AI.method: 在传统电子-声子介导超导框架下，开发了光辐照超导薄膜的非平衡响应第一性原理模型，利用新数值技术在实频轴上直接求解Migdal-Eliashberg方程
AI.result: 定量再现了泵浦-探测实验中超导薄膜的光学响应，验证了Pb和LaH10的微分反射率测量；预测K3C60在超快中红外脉冲辐照下产生光诱导超导态；预测CaC6中类似的光诱导超导能隙
AI.conclusion: 光诱导超导在比先前认识更多的材料中是可实现的，该框架解释了光诱导超导态的性质并阐明了后续准粒子和声子动力学

title: Reversible Steady Domain-Wall Motion Driven by a Direct Current
summary: Understanding and manipulating nanoscale domain wall (DW) dynamics is a central topic in magnetism and spintronics for its promising applications in logic and memory devices. In most magnetic systems, inertia affects only transient DW dynamics, while the long-time DW motion is uniquely determined by the magnitude and direction of the applied current. Here we show that this paradigm breaks down in ferrimagnets near the angular momentum compensation point. We demonstrate that a DW can propagate steadily either forward or backward even under a direct current, with the direction controlled solely by the current strength. This anomalous phenomenon originates from the inertial dynamics of an internal DW collective coordinate, which behaves as a massive object evolving in a current-dependent double-well potential. Depending on the driving current, the system relaxes into distinct stable states associated with opposite directions of motion. Our findings reveal an unexpected role of inertia in nonlinear spin dynamics, and enable low-energy spintronic functionalities including sensitive magnetic-field detection and reconfigurable one-port devices.

AI.tldr: 铁磁体中的畴壁在角动量补偿点附近表现出反常惯性动力学，可在直流电流下实现双向运动，方向仅由电流强度控制。
AI.motivation: 理解和操控纳米尺度畴壁动力学对磁性和自旋电子学应用至关重要，传统范式认为惯性只影响瞬态动力学，长期运动由电流决定，但这一范式在铁磁体中可能被打破。
AI.method: 研究铁磁体在角动量补偿点附近的畴壁动力学，通过分析内部畴壁集体坐标的惯性行为，将其建模为在电流依赖双势阱中演化的有质量物体。
AI.result: 畴壁可在直流电流下稳定向前或向后传播，运动方向仅由电流强度控制，系统可弛豫到与相反运动方向相关的不同稳定状态。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了惯性在非线性自旋动力学中的意外作用，为实现低能耗自旋电子功能（包括灵敏磁场检测和可重构单端口器件）提供了新途径。

title: Thermal relaxation asymmetry persists under inertial effects
summary: We algebraically prove the asymmetry in thermal relaxation in phase space in the entire range from overdamped dynamics to underdamped dynamics. We show that for the same setup as for overdamped dynamics, even in the more general case of phase-space relaxation, i.e., underdamped dynamics, far-from-equilibrium heating is faster than cooling. Upon isolating the relevant relaxational contribution to the entropy production, we find that the asymmetry persist for underdamped dynamics that are linearly driven out of equilibrium. The coupling of positions and velocities emerging in this generalization further underscores, in a striking manner, the intricate dynamics of such thermal relaxation processes that do not pass through local equilibria. Investigating the overdamped limit, our generalized approach reveals, interestingly, that an excess free energy contribution from the velocity degrees of freedom does not trivially vanish in the overdamped limit, but is instead affected by the precise interpretation of temperature quenches in overdamped systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文代数证明了从过阻尼到欠阻尼整个范围内相空间热弛豫的不对称性，发现远离平衡的加热过程比冷却过程更快。
AI.motivation: 研究热弛豫过程在相空间中的不对称性，特别是在从过阻尼到欠阻尼的整个动力学范围内，探索远离平衡条件下加热和冷却过程的差异。
AI.method: 采用代数证明方法，分析相空间弛豫过程，分离熵产生中的弛豫贡献，研究线性驱动远离平衡的欠阻尼动力学。
AI.result: 发现热弛豫不对称性在欠阻尼动力学中持续存在，远离平衡的加热比冷却更快；在过阻尼极限下，速度自由度的额外自由能贡献不会平凡消失，而是受温度淬火解释的影响。
AI.conclusion: 相空间热弛豫过程表现出复杂的不对称动力学特性，位置和速度的耦合进一步强调了这种不经过局部平衡的弛豫过程的复杂性。

title: Isotope Effects in 2D correlation infrared Spectra of Water: HEOM Analysis of Molecular Dynamics-Based Machine Learning Models
summary: We model, simulate, and analyze the intramolecular modes of liquid H2O and D2O to elucidate how energy excitation, relaxation, and vibrational dephasing interplay through anharmonic mode-mode coupling. Our analysis employs two-dimensional (2D) correlation spectra, a representative observable in nonlinear infrared vibrational spectroscopy. Accurate reproduction of these 2D spectral profiles requires not only a precise dynamical description of intramolecular vibrations but also an appropriate treatment of thermal environmental effects arising from strong interactions with surrounding molecules, which act as thermal baths. Capturing the essential features of the 2D spectra further demands a non-Markovian, non-perturbative, and nonlinear description of the interactions between intramolecular modes and their baths. To this end, we adopt a hierarchical equations of motion (HEOM) framework to compute the 2D spectra. By comparing the resulting spectra of H2O and D2O, we explore the underlying mechanisms governing their complex energy and phase relaxation dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该研究采用层次运动方程(HEOM)框架计算液态H2O和D2O的二维红外光谱，通过比较同位素效应揭示分子内振动模式与热环境相互作用的非马尔可夫、非微扰和非线性动力学机制。
AI.motivation: 理解液态水中分子内振动模式的能量激发、弛豫和振动退相过程，以及这些过程如何通过非谐模式耦合相互作用。需要准确描述分子内振动与周围分子热环境之间的强相互作用，这对精确再现二维红外光谱至关重要。
AI.method: 采用层次运动方程(HEOM)框架计算二维红外相关光谱，该框架能够非马尔可夫、非微扰和非线性地描述分子内振动模式与热浴之间的相互作用。通过比较H2O和D2O的光谱差异来探索其动力学机制。
AI.result: 成功计算并比较了H2O和D2O的二维红外光谱，揭示了分子内振动模式与热环境相互作用的复杂能量和相位弛豫动力学。HEOM方法能够准确捕捉二维光谱的关键特征，包括非马尔可夫效应和非线性相互作用。
AI.conclusion: HEOM框架是研究液态水分子内振动动力学的有效工具，能够揭示同位素效应对能量弛豫和振动退相过程的影响，为理解复杂分子系统与热环境相互作用提供了理论和方法基础。

title: Long photoexcited carrier lifetime in a stable and earth-abundant zinc polyphosphide
summary: Halide perovskites have revolutionized optoelectronics by demonstrating that long carrier lifetime can be achieved in materials processed in relatively uncontrolled environments, whereas conventional inorganic semiconductors typically suffer from short carrier lifetime unless very carefully prepared and postprocessed. Here, we report the discovery of exceptionally long photoexcited carrier lifetime in monoclinic ZnP2, effectively bridging the carrier lifetime gap between direct-gap inorganic semiconductors and halide perovskites. Through computational screening, ZnP2 is identified as a long carrier lifetime semiconductor characterized by an unconventional polyphosphide bonding, combining covalently bonded phosphorus chains and polar-covalent Zn-P tetrahedra. Experimentally, ZnP2 crystals synthesized from low-purity precursors exhibit bright band-to-band photoluminescence at 1.49 eV and carrier lifetimes of nearly 1 $μ$s. Further analysis reveals that the polyphosphide bonding of ZnP2 suppresses the formation of deep intrinsic defects, making it defect resistant. Combined with its remarkable environmental stability, ZnP2 presents a highly promising material for solar absorbers and light emitters. Our work illustrates that underexplored inorganic materials spaces with unusual chemical bonding hold great promise for discovering novel optoelectronic materials.

AI.tldr: 在单斜ZnP2中发现超长载流子寿命，填补了直接带隙无机半导体与卤化物钙钛矿之间的载流子寿命差距
AI.motivation: 卤化物钙钛矿在相对不受控环境中仍能实现长载流子寿命，而传统无机半导体需要精心制备才能获得长寿命。寻找具有类似优异性能的无机半导体材料
AI.method: 通过计算筛选发现ZnP2具有长载流子寿命特性，实验合成ZnP2晶体并测量其光致发光和载流子寿命
AI.result: ZnP2晶体在1.49 eV处表现出明亮的带间光致发光，载流子寿命接近1微秒，具有缺陷抵抗性和优异的环境稳定性
AI.conclusion: ZnP2是具有超长载流子寿命的缺陷抵抗性材料，适用于太阳能吸收器和发光器件。具有非常规化学键的未充分探索无机材料空间有望发现新型光电材料

title: Fast Real-Axis Eliashberg Calculations: Full-bandwidth solutions beyond the constant density of states approximation
summary: Experimentally relevant signatures of superconductivity require access to real-frequency quantities, such as the spectral functions, optical response, and transport properties, yet Migdal-Eliashberg calculations are commonly performed on the imaginary axis and then analytically continued, a step that is numerically delicate and can obscure physically relevant spectral features. Here we present a practical route to solving the finite-temperature Migdal-Eliashberg equations directly on the real-frequency axis, while retaining the effects from the full-bandwidth electronic structure. Our formulation accounts for particle-hole asymmetry through an energy-dependent electronic density of states, avoiding the constant density of states approximation often used in real-axis calculations, and includes a static screened Coulomb contribution. We introduce an efficient numerical technique to solve the Migdal-Eliashberg integrals whose computational cost scales linearly with the real-frequency grid, making high-resolution, full-bandwidth real-axis calculations feasible and providing direct access to the interacting Green's function and derived observables without analytic continuation. As an illustration, we apply the method to H$_{3}$S, where a van-Hove singularity near the Fermi level produces strong particle-hole asymmetry. The full-bandwidth solution yields noticeably different spectra than the constant density of states approximation and brings the superconducting gap and lineshapes into closer agreement with experiment, highlighting when band-structure details are essential. Furthermore, the methods presented here open the door to time-dependent, nonequilibrium simulations within Eliashberg theory.

AI.tldr: 提出一种在实频率轴上直接求解有限温度Migdal-Eliashberg方程的方法，避免了传统虚轴计算需要解析延拓的问题，能够直接获得谱函数等实验相关物理量。
AI.motivation: 传统Migdal-Eliashberg计算通常在虚轴上进行，然后通过解析延拓获得实频率物理量，但这一过程数值不稳定且可能掩盖重要的谱特征。实验相关的超导特征（如谱函数、光学响应、输运性质）需要在实频率上直接计算。
AI.method: 开发了在实频率轴上直接求解有限温度Migdal-Eliashberg方程的实用方法，包含全带宽电子结构效应。考虑粒子-空穴不对称性（通过能量依赖的态密度），避免常用的常数态密度近似，并包含静态屏蔽库仑贡献。引入高效数值技术，计算成本随实频率网格线性增长。
AI.result: 将方法应用于H₃S，其中费米能级附近的van-Hove奇点产生强粒子-空穴不对称性。全带宽解得到的谱与常数态密度近似有明显差异，超导能隙和线形与实验更吻合，表明能带结构细节在某些情况下至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使得高分辨率、全带宽的实轴计算变得可行，无需解析延拓即可直接获得相互作用格林函数和可观测物理量。此外，该方法为Eliashberg理论中的时间依赖非平衡模拟打开了大门。

title: Spin-Charge Groups for Fermions in Fluids and Crystals: General Structures and Physical Consequences
summary: Known symmetry groups are not sufficient to handle various couplings between spin, charge and spatial degrees of freedom for fermions. To fill in this gap, we introduce the spin-charge groups (SCG) to describe the most general symmetries of fermionic systems. These groups are composed of the spin and charge operations as the `internal' symmetries, the spatial and temporal operations as `external' symmetries, couplings between them, and projective twists. After providing the general group structures of SCG, we study their potential applications in concrete physical systems, including $^3$He superfluids, charge-4e superconductors, collinear magnets with spin-fluxes, and superconductors with coexisting magnetic orders. We show that SCG can give rise to extra band degeneracies, Chern numbers and cross spin-charge responses like spin-supercurrents. Hence SCG provide a route to classify and explore new phases of matter even when strong interactions are included.

AI.tldr: 该论文引入了自旋-电荷群(SCG)来描述费米子系统的最一般对称性，填补了现有对称群无法处理自旋、电荷和空间自由度之间各种耦合的空白。
AI.motivation: 已知的对称群不足以处理费米子系统中自旋、电荷和空间自由度之间的各种耦合。需要新的对称性框架来填补这一空白，以描述更一般的物理系统对称性。
AI.method: 引入自旋-电荷群(SCG)，该群包含作为"内部"对称性的自旋和电荷操作、作为"外部"对称性的空间和时间操作、它们之间的耦合以及投影扭曲。研究SCG的一般群结构，并将其应用于具体物理系统。
AI.result: SCG能够产生额外的能带简并、陈数和交叉自旋-电荷响应（如自旋超电流）。在多个物理系统中展示了SCG的应用，包括³He超流体、电荷-4e超导体、具有自旋通量的共线磁体以及具有共存磁序的超导体。
AI.conclusion: 自旋-电荷群为分类和探索物质新相提供了一条途径，即使在包含强相互作用的情况下也适用。SCG框架能够处理传统对称群无法描述的复杂耦合现象。

title: Geometric blockade in a quantum dot coupled to two-dimensional and three dimensional electron gases
summary: We fabricated a quantum dot coupled laterally to a two-dimensional electron gas and vertically to a three-dimensional electron gas in order to investigate the eigenstate dependence of tunneling rate to these gases. We observed a bias-dependent ``geometric" current blockade. By tunneling via the asymmetric couplings, population inversion is induced and a dark metastable triplet state is revealed. The metastable state stops the current transport process, suppresses the current and asymmetrically widens the Coulomb diamond. By analyzing the current as a function of source-drain and gate voltage and the magnetic field, we concluded that this effect is due to the geometric shape of the electronic states in the dot and the current is limited by the tunneling rate due to the eigenstates, that is, artificial $σ$-coupling and $π$-coupling.

AI.tldr: 量子点通过不对称耦合产生几何电流阻塞，揭示了暗亚稳态三重态，电流受本征态隧穿速率限制
AI.motivation: 研究量子点到二维和三维电子气的隧穿速率对本征态的依赖性，探索几何形状对电子输运的影响
AI.method: 制备横向耦合到二维电子气、纵向耦合到三维电子气的量子点，通过分析源漏电压、栅极电压和磁场依赖的电流特性
AI.result: 观察到偏压依赖的"几何"电流阻塞，通过不对称耦合诱导粒子数反转，揭示了暗亚稳态三重态，该态阻止电流输运，抑制电流并不对称地展宽库仑菱形
AI.conclusion: 几何电流阻塞效应源于量子点中电子态的几何形状，电流受本征态隧穿速率限制，即人工σ耦合和π耦合

title: Extreme value statistics and some applications in statistical physics
comment: 31 pages, 9 figures, notes to a lecture given at FPSP XVI in Oropa
summary: These notes are based on lectures delivered by G. Schehr at the XVIth School on Fundamental Problems in Statistical Physics (FPSP), held in Oropa (Italy) from 30 June to 11 July 2025. After a brief introduction to extreme value statistics (EVS) for independent and identically distributed (IID) random variables, we discuss several paradigmatic examples of strongly correlated systems where classical extreme value theory no longer applies. In particular, we focus on time series generated by random walks and Brownian motion, as well as on eigenvalue statistics in random matrix theory. Emphasis is placed on applications of EVS to fundamental problems in statistical physics and disordered systems, including the Random Energy Model, stochastic search problems, as well as fluctuating interfaces, and directed polymers in random media within the Kardar-Parisi-Zhang universality class.

AI.tldr: 关于极端值统计在强关联系统中的综述讲座笔记，涵盖随机游走、布朗运动、随机矩阵理论等经典系统，及其在统计物理和随机系统中的应用。
AI.motivation: 经典极端值统计理论仅适用于独立同分布随机变量，但在统计物理中许多系统具有强相关性，需要发展适用于强关联系统的极端值统计理论。
AI.method: 通过分析几个典型强关联系统：随机游走和布朗运动生成的时间序列、随机矩阵理论中的特征值统计，研究极端值统计在这些系统中的行为。
AI.result: 展示了在强关联系统中极端值统计与经典理论的不同行为，并应用于多个统计物理问题，包括随机能量模型、随机搜索问题、涨落界面和随机介质中的定向聚合物。
AI.conclusion: 强关联系统中的极端值统计展现出与经典理论不同的丰富行为，这些研究对于理解统计物理和随机系统中的基本问题具有重要意义。

title: Visualization-Based Approach to Condensed-Phase Line Broadening Using Polyene Chains
summary: Condensed-phase spectral line shapes encode the strength and timescale of interactions between molecules and their environments, yet these ideas are often difficult to introduce at the undergraduate level due to their reliance on formal theoretical treatments. We present a visualization-based approach that combines analytic results with numerical simulations to illustrate the physical origins of spectral line broadening in conjugated molecular systems. Using a time-dependent Hückel Hamiltonian, we derive closed-form expressions for coherent electronic motion in finite polyene chains and show how these results provide direct insight into the role of molecular orbital structure in light absorption. Environmental effects are introduced through stochastic fluctuations of the Hamiltonian matrix elements, allowing students to observe how system--environment interactions disrupt coherent motion and produce scattering-like features in electronic trajectories. Real-space animations and simulated absorption spectra provide an intuitive link between microscopic dynamics and measured line shapes. The MATLAB code provided with this work offers an accessible platform for integrating computation and visualization into undergraduate instruction while introducing key concepts in condensed-phase spectroscopy.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于可视化的教学方法，结合解析结果和数值模拟，帮助本科生理解共轭分子体系中光谱线展宽的物理起源。
AI.motivation: 凝聚相光谱线形编码了分子与其环境相互作用的强度和时标，但这些概念通常依赖于形式理论处理，难以在本科阶段引入。需要一种更直观的教学方法来帮助学生理解这些复杂概念。
AI.method: 采用基于可视化的方法，结合解析推导和数值模拟。使用时依赖的Hückel哈密顿量推导有限聚烯链中相干电子运动的闭式表达式，通过哈密顿矩阵元的随机涨落引入环境效应，并创建实空间动画和模拟吸收光谱。
AI.result: 推导出的闭式表达式直接揭示了分子轨道结构在光吸收中的作用，通过数值模拟展示了系统-环境相互作用如何破坏相干运动并在电子轨迹中产生散射样特征，建立了微观动力学与测量线形之间的直观联系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在本科教学中整合计算和可视化提供了可访问的平台，同时引入了凝聚相光谱学的关键概念，使复杂的光谱线展宽现象更易于本科生理解。

title: From Atomistic Models to Machine Learning: Predictive Design of Nanocarbons under Extreme Conditions
summary: The formation of technologically valuable nanocarbon structures under extreme conditions, such as those produced during high-explosive detonations, remains poorly understood but holds significant potential for the development of controlled synthesis pathways. While detonation shockwaves provide the HPHT environment required for nanodiamond formation, subsequent cooling and decompression dictate whether the diamond phase is preserved or transformed into other nanocarbon structures. Here, we employ GPU-accelerated ReaxFF simulations to investigate the graphitization and structural remodeling of detonation nanodiamond under nonlinear quench and pressure-release conditions. We further investigate how the initial nanodiamond morphology influences the resulting transformation products. Evolution of nanostructure, allotrope, carbon hybridization, and ring statistics are tracked. Rapid cooling combined with slow decompression optimizes cubic diamond retention, whereas slow cooling with rapid pressure release promotes surface-to-core graphitization, producing concentric sp2 layers and hollowed inner shells. Octahedral nanodiamonds evolve into carbon nano-onions, initially forming bucky diamonds that progressively transform into full sp2 structures, while hexagonal prisms preferentially form parallel-stacked graphite layers resembling carbon dots. Lonsdaleite emerges as an interfacial phase, suggesting potential reversibility in the shock-induced graphite-to-diamond transformation pathway transformation route. To extend predictive capabilities, we trained MLP regressors on over 10^5 node-hours of simulations. The model reliably predicts the number of graphitized layers from T-P trajectories with R^2 exceeding 0.90. Collectively, morphological control combined with optimized quench-decompression conditions promote the selective synthesis of nanocarbon allotropes.

AI.tldr: 通过GPU加速ReaxFF模拟研究爆轰纳米金刚石在非线性淬火和降压条件下的石墨化与结构重塑，发现冷却和降压速率影响相变产物，初始形貌决定最终结构（碳纳米洋葱或石墨层），并训练MLP模型预测石墨化层数。
AI.motivation: 极端条件下（如高能炸药爆轰）形成有价值纳米碳结构的机制尚不清楚，但具有开发可控合成路径的重要潜力。虽然爆轰冲击波提供了纳米金刚石形成所需的高压高温环境，但后续的冷却和降压过程决定了金刚石相是否保留或转变为其他纳米碳结构。
AI.method: 采用GPU加速的ReaxFF模拟研究爆轰纳米金刚石在非线性淬火和压力释放条件下的石墨化与结构重塑。追踪纳米结构、同素异形体、碳杂化和环统计的演变。训练MLP回归模型基于超过10^5节点小时的模拟数据，预测T-P轨迹下的石墨化层数。
AI.result: 快速冷却结合缓慢降压优化了立方金刚石的保留，而缓慢冷却结合快速降压促进表面到核心的石墨化，产生同心sp2层和空心内壳。八面体纳米金刚石演变成碳纳米洋葱，六角棱柱优先形成平行堆叠的石墨层。朗斯代尔石作为界面相出现。MLP模型能可靠预测石墨化层数，R²超过0.90。
AI.conclusion: 形态控制结合优化的淬火-降压条件促进纳米碳同素异形体的选择性合成。朗斯代尔石的出现表明冲击诱导的石墨-金刚石转变路径具有潜在可逆性。该方法为可控合成特定纳米碳结构提供了理论指导。

title: Nb$_3$Sn Films Exhibiting Continuous Supercurrent Across a Diffusion Bonded Seam
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, submitted to Superconductor Science and Technology
summary: Multiple pairs of bronze pieces were joined along a common seam and then exposed to Nb vapor via sputter deposition during heating at $\sim$715 $^\circ$C to form a diffusion bond between the pieces. Polishing and alignment of the pieces created smooth surfaces normal to the Nb flux with seams perpendicular to the surface (i.e. parallel to the Nb flux). Conversion of Nb to Nb$_3$Sn took place simultaneously with diffusion bonding, resulting in Nb$_3$Sn thin films that coated bronze surfaces and spanned seams with uniform thickness. Characterization of superconducting properties via magneto-optical imaging suggests that supercurrent flows freely across the seam in several examples when cooled to 9 K and shielding or trapping low magnetic field. Modification of the process to coat the pieces with Nb prior to diffusion bonding and Nb$_3$Sn formation resulted in varying degrees of seam coverage by the resultant Nb$_3$Sn films. The pre-coating method did not produce any example with quality comparable to the examples obtained by the hot bronze approach. This work could enable new approaches to joining Nb$_3$Sn materials in magnet conductor and RF cavity applications.

AI.tldr: 通过Nb蒸气沉积在加热的青铜件上形成扩散连接，同时生成Nb₃Sn薄膜跨越接缝，实现超导电流自由传输
AI.motivation: 开发新的Nb₃Sn材料连接方法，用于磁体导体和射频腔应用，解决超导材料连接问题
AI.method: 将多对青铜件沿接缝对齐，在~715°C加热时通过溅射沉积暴露于Nb蒸气，同时进行扩散连接和Nb₃Sn转化；还尝试了预涂Nb的方法
AI.result: 热青铜方法成功生成均匀厚度的Nb₃Sn薄膜跨越接缝，超导电流在9K时自由流过接缝；预涂Nb方法效果较差
AI.conclusion: 热青铜方法能有效连接Nb₃Sn材料，为磁体导体和射频腔应用提供了新的连接途径

title: Disentangling Shear and Compression Phonons: Route to Anomalous Magnetothermal Transport
summary: Magnetothermal transport in various frustrated magnets exhibits striking field-dependent anomalies that deviate from conventional magnon or phonon transport. Here we show that symmetry-constrained spin-lattice coupling naturally leads to mode-selective spin-phonon interactions that control heat transport. In the strong spin-orbit coupling limit, we derive an effective spin-phonon Hamiltonian in which phonons with different polarizations couple selectively to distinct spin operators. As a result, compression and shear phonon modes contribute to spin heat current across different magnetic-field regimes. Using a Landauer transport framework combined with exact diagonalization of spin chains coupled to a phonon bath, we show that this mechanism produces a characteristic peak-dip-peak structure in the field dependence of heat current, providing a microscopic explanation for field-induced transport anomalies in spin-orbit-coupled Mott insulators.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了强自旋轨道耦合下受对称性约束的自旋-晶格耦合如何通过模式选择性自旋-声子相互作用调控热输运，解释了受挫磁体中磁场依赖的热输运异常现象。
AI.motivation: 受挫磁体中的磁热输运表现出与常规磁振子或声子输运不同的显著磁场依赖异常现象，需要从微观机制上解释这些异常。
AI.method: 在强自旋轨道耦合极限下推导有效自旋-声子哈密顿量，采用Landauer输运框架结合自旋链与声子浴耦合的精确对角化方法。
AI.result: 发现压缩和剪切声子模式在不同磁场区域对自旋热流有选择性贡献，产生特征性的峰-谷-峰结构，为自旋轨道耦合Mott绝缘体中的场致输运异常提供了微观解释。
AI.conclusion: 对称性约束的自旋-晶格耦合通过模式选择性自旋-声子相互作用控制热输运，这为理解受挫磁体中复杂的磁场依赖热输运异常提供了新的理论框架。

title: Quantum confinement in semiconductor random alloys: a case study on Si/SiGe/Si
summary: Local composition fluctuations in random alloys become crucial when one or more dimensions are reduced to the nanoscale. Using extended Hückel theory, we study the semiconductor random alloy SiGe sandwiched between Si due to its relevance for transistor devices. We evaluate the effects of the alloy composition, layer thickness, and local fluctuations of the Ge concentration on the band alignment and the band gap. The results are compared with the finite quantum well model. That model captures the essential physics and can act as a computationally faster alternative.

AI.tldr: 研究SiGe合金在Si夹层中的局部成分波动对能带结构和带隙的影响，并与有限量子阱模型比较
AI.motivation: 随机合金在纳米尺度下的局部成分波动对器件性能至关重要，特别是对于晶体管应用中的SiGe合金
AI.method: 使用扩展Hückel理论研究SiGe合金在Si夹层中的能带对齐和带隙，考虑合金成分、层厚和Ge浓度局部波动的影响
AI.result: 有限量子阱模型能够捕捉主要物理特性，可作为计算更快的替代方案
AI.conclusion: 对于SiGe合金在Si夹层中的能带结构研究，有限量子阱模型提供了有效的简化方法，能够快速计算并保留关键物理特性

title: Role of inertia on the performance of Brownian gyrators
summary: Understanding the role of inertia in nanoscale heat transport is fundamental to the design of efficient nano-thermodynamics systems. In this work, we experimentally address the non-equilibrium dynamics of a Brownian gyrator, a paradigmatic model for nano-heat machines, that converts heat flow between two thermal baths into steady-state rotation. Using an optically levitated nanoparticle in a controlled vacuum environment, we study the transition from overdamped to underdamped dynamics of the gyrator. We demonstrate that, while the spatial signature of the non-equilibrium steady state vanishes as damping decreases, the rotational dynamics and energetics are optimized at a critical damping. Our findings reveal the importance of inertia for maximising the performance of nanoscale machines and provide fundamental insights into the design of efficient nano heat engines and processes.

AI.tldr: 实验研究布朗回转器的非平衡动力学，发现惯性在纳米热机性能优化中的关键作用
AI.motivation: 理解惯性在纳米尺度热传输中的作用对于设计高效纳米热力学系统至关重要，布朗回转器作为纳米热机的典型模型，其非平衡动力学需要实验研究
AI.method: 使用光学悬浮纳米粒子在受控真空环境中研究布朗回转器，从过阻尼到欠阻尼动力学的转变过程
AI.result: 发现随着阻尼减小，非平衡稳态的空间特征消失，但旋转动力学和能量学在临界阻尼处达到最优，揭示了惯性对最大化纳米机器性能的重要性
AI.conclusion: 惯性对于优化纳米尺度机器性能至关重要，为设计高效纳米热机和过程提供了基础性见解

title: Elucidating Norrish Type-I reactive pathways by ultrafast X-ray absorption spectroscopy
summary: Norrish type I reactions selectively cleave carbon-carbon bonds directly adjacent to carbonyl groups. Despite their broad use in combination with aromatic carbonyls for additive manufacturing and dental UV curing applications, the nature of the photochemically active state and its population mechanism remain insufficiently understood. Detailed mechanistic insight requires mapping of the photoexcited population flow involving internal conversion and intersystem crossing. We present a time-domain study of gas phase acetophenone as a prototypical aromatic carbonyl combining soft X-ray time-resolved near-edge X-ray absorption fine structure (TR-NEXAFS) spectroscopy at the oxygen K-edge with ab initio multiple spawning (AIMS) simulations. Exploiting the specific sensitivity of TR-NEXAFS spectroscopy to states with $nπ^*$ character, we observe population transfer from the initially excited $^1ππ^*$ state to the $^1nπ^*$ state with a time constant of $(0.13 \pm 0.02)$ ps after an initial induction period of $(0.12 \pm 0.02)$ ps without population transfer, in quantitative agreement with the AIMS simulations. The population in the $^1nπ^*$ state subsequently decays via intersystem crossing, likely mediated by a $^3ππ^*$ state, within $(3.17 \pm 0.66)$ ps to a long-lived $^3nπ^*$ state, which is presumed to be active towards Norrish type I chemistry.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过软X射线时间分辨近边X射线吸收精细结构光谱和从头算多重生成模拟，揭示了苯乙酮光激发后从¹ππ*态到¹nπ*态再到³nπ*态（Norrish I型反应活性态）的精确动力学过程。
AI.motivation: Norrish I型反应在芳香羰基化合物的光化学应用中广泛使用，但其光化学活性态的性质和布居机制仍不清楚。需要详细研究光激发后的布居流动，包括内转换和系间窜越过程。
AI.method: 结合软X射线时间分辨近边X射线吸收精细结构光谱（氧K边）和从头算多重生成模拟，研究气相苯乙酮作为典型芳香羰基化合物的光激发动力学。
AI.result: 观察到从初始激发的¹ππ*态到¹nπ*态的布居转移，时间常数为(0.13±0.02)ps，初始诱导期为(0.12±0.02)ps。¹nπ*态随后通过系间窜越（可能经由³ππ*态）在(3.17±0.66)ps内衰变到长寿命的³nπ*态，该态被认为是Norrish I型反应的活性态。
AI.conclusion: 研究定量揭示了苯乙酮光激发后的完整动力学路径，为理解芳香羰基化合物的Norrish I型反应机制提供了重要见解，实验与模拟结果高度一致。

title: Asymmetric Energy Landscapes Control Diffusion in Glasses
summary: While diffusion in crystalline solids is quantitatively understood through defect-mediated atomic hops, no comparable quantitative framework exists for glasses. In these systems, the origin of large diffusion activation energies remains puzzling, despite local rearrangements involving low barriers. Using molecular dynamics simulations of metallic glasses, we decompose diffusion into random-walk and correlation contributions and find that back-and-forth correlated motion, not local rearrangement barriers, dominates the activation energy, resolving how low-barrier rearrangements yield large macroscopic activation energies. These correlations arise from asymmetry between forward and reverse barriers, a generic feature of disordered energy landscapes. We find that the correlation-driven mechanism is active beyond metallic glass alloys, including SiO2 and a single-component Lennard-Jones glass. The latter demonstrates that the correlation originates from structural disorder rather than chemical complexity. The framework also explains accelerated surface diffusion, where reduced activation energies arise primarily from weaker correlations rather than changes in local rearrangement barriers. Our results establish a direct, quantitative link between atomic-scale dynamics and macroscopic transport, providing a predictive basis for kinetics in disordered materials.

AI.tldr: 玻璃中扩散的高活化能主要源于原子运动的相关性（前后往返运动），而非局部重排的能垒，这一机制在多种无序材料中普遍存在。
AI.motivation: 晶体中的扩散通过缺陷介导的原子跳跃已被定量理解，但玻璃中扩散的定量框架仍缺失。玻璃中局部重排能垒低，却表现出大的扩散活化能，这一矛盾需要解释。
AI.method: 使用金属玻璃的分子动力学模拟，将扩散分解为随机行走和相关贡献两部分，分析前后往返相关运动对活化能的主导作用。
AI.result: 发现扩散活化能主要由前后往返相关运动主导，而非局部重排能垒。这种相关性源于无序能量景观中正向和反向能垒的不对称性。该机制在SiO2和单组分Lennard-Jones玻璃中也存在，表明其源于结构无序而非化学复杂性。该框架还能解释表面扩散加速现象。
AI.conclusion: 建立了原子尺度动力学与宏观输运之间的直接定量联系，为无序材料中的动力学提供了预测基础，解决了低能垒重排如何产生大宏观活化能的长期难题。

title: Weak Localization and Magnetoconductance in Percolative Superconducting Aluminum Films
summary: In order to investigate the crossover from the homogeneous behavior to inhomogeneous (percolative) one, the temperature $T$ and magnetic field H dependence of the sheet resistance $R_\square$ have been measured for two-dimensional granular aluminum films. Fitting the theory to data of magnetoconductance near $T_C$ with use of the diffusion constant $D(T)$ as a fitting parameter, we have obtained the anomalous $T$-dependent diffusion constant $D$. From the analysis of $D(T)$, the electron diffusion index $θ$, a certain critical exponent in percolation theory, has been obtained. In the relation $R_\square-θ$, the value of $θ$ varies abruptly near $1.5kω$. This behavior suggesting the above mentioned crossover is similar to our previous results determined from the temperature dependence of the upper critical field. For percolative films in $H = 5\mathrm{T}$, we have found the strong $R_\square$ dependence of the prefactor $α_T$ in the expression$σ=[α_T e^2/(2π^2\hbar)]\ln T+σ_0$. The relation $α_T\propto1/R_\square$ can be explained qualitatively by a model of scaling law for percolation.

AI.tldr: 二维颗粒铝薄膜的电阻测量显示从均匀行为到非均匀（渗流）行为的转变，通过分析反常温度依赖的扩散常数获得渗流临界指数θ，发现θ在1.5kΩ附近突变，表明渗流转变。
AI.motivation: 研究二维颗粒铝薄膜中从均匀超导行为到非均匀渗流行为的转变，理解渗流理论在超导系统中的表现。
AI.method: 测量二维颗粒铝薄膜的电阻随温度和磁场的变化，通过拟合Tc附近的磁导数据获得反常温度依赖的扩散常数D(T)，进而分析得到渗流临界指数θ。
AI.result: 发现渗流指数θ在电阻约1.5kΩ处突变，表明从均匀到渗流行为的转变；在5T磁场下，渗流薄膜的σ表达式中αT因子与电阻成反比关系，符合渗流标度律模型。
AI.conclusion: 二维颗粒铝薄膜中存在从均匀到渗流行为的转变，渗流临界指数θ的突变位置与先前上临界场测量结果一致，αT与电阻的反比关系支持渗流标度律模型。

title: Longitudinal Nonreciprocal Charge Transport with Time Reversal Symmetry
comment: 5 pages + 4 figures + 1 Table + Appendix(3 pages), Suggestions are most welcome
summary: Longitudinal nonreciprocal charge transport is widely believed to require time-reversal symmetry breaking, either in magnetic materials or through external magnetic fields. Here, we show that longitudinal nonreciprocity can arise even in nonmagnetic conductors without magnetic fields through disorder-induced asymmetric scattering. Using a semiclassical Boltzmann framework, we develop a general theory in which skew-scattering and side-jump processes generate a nonlinear longitudinal current that remains finite even in time-reversal-symmetric systems. A systematic symmetry analysis identifies 42 point groups that permit this extrinsic mechanism. As a concrete realization, we demonstrate that Bernal-stacked bilayer graphene exhibits a large and gate-tunable longitudinal nonreciprocal response with a sizable nonreciprocity factor near its Lifshitz transition. These results establish disorder-driven asymmetric scattering as a general mechanism for bulk longitudinal nonreciprocal charge transport in crystalline conductors.

AI.tldr: 在非磁性导体中，无序诱导的不对称散射可以产生纵向非互易电荷输运，无需时间反演对称性破缺
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为纵向非互易电荷输运需要时间反演对称性破缺（磁性材料或外磁场），本文旨在证明在非磁性导体中，无序诱导的不对称散射也能产生这种效应
AI.method: 使用半经典玻尔兹曼框架，发展了一个通用理论，其中斜散射和侧跳过程产生非线性纵向电流；通过系统对称性分析识别了42个允许这种外禀机制的点群；以Bernal堆叠双层石墨烯为具体实现
AI.result: 理论预测在42个点群中可能存在纵向非互易响应；在Bernal堆叠双层石墨烯中实验观测到大的、栅极可调的纵向非互易响应，在Lifshitz转变附近具有显著的非互易因子
AI.conclusion: 无序驱动的不对称散射是晶体导体中体纵向非互易电荷输运的通用机制，为在非磁性材料中实现非互易输运提供了新途径

title: Resonances, Recurrence Times and Steady States in Monitored Noisy Qubit Systems
summary: We study non-equilibrium steady states and recurrence times in noisy, stroboscopically monitored qubit systems using complete measurements. In the noiseless limit, recurrence times are integer-quantized, with dips to lower integers when sampling approaches revival conditions associated with ergodicity breaking. Using an IBM quantum platform, we find that quantization is robust when sampling far from revivals, but breaks down dramatically near revivals: even weak noise produces large deviations and can invert the expected dips into pronounced peaks. To explain this behavior, we formulate a statistical-physics model of monitored noisy circuits in which monitoring drives an effective infinite-temperature steady state while thermal-like relaxation competes to favor a low-temperature limit. We show that the sampling time tunes a crossover between these regimes, near revivals stabilizing low-temperature behavior, and far from revivals restoring infinite-temperature behavior -- with noise strength and detuning acting as coupled small parameters near resonance.

AI.tldr: 研究噪声量子比特系统中非平衡稳态和重现时间，发现无噪声时重现时间整数量子化，噪声破坏量子化并反转预期行为
AI.motivation: 研究在噪声和测量下的量子系统中非平衡稳态和重现时间的特性，特别是量子化行为对噪声的鲁棒性
AI.method: 使用IBM量子平台实验研究，并构建统计物理模型描述噪声监控电路，分析测量驱动的有效无限温度稳态与热弛豫竞争
AI.result: 无噪声时重现时间整数量子化，噪声下量子化在远离恢复点时鲁棒，但在恢复点附近严重破坏，弱噪声即可导致大偏差并反转预期行为
AI.conclusion: 采样时间调节无限温度与低温行为之间的交叉，恢复点附近稳定低温行为，远离恢复点恢复无限温度行为，噪声强度和失谐在共振附近作为耦合小参数

title: An SO(3)-equivariant reciprocal-space neural potential for long-range interactions
summary: Long-range electrostatic and polarization interactions play a central role in molecular and condensed-phase systems, yet remain fundamentally incompatible with locality-based machine-learning interatomic potentials. Although modern SO(3)-equivariant neural potentials achieve high accuracy for short-range chemistry, they cannot represent the anisotropic, slowly decaying multipolar correlations governing realistic materials, while existing long-range extensions either break SO(3) equivariance or fail to maintain energy-force consistency. Here we introduce EquiEwald, a unified neural interatomic potential that embeds an Ewald-inspired reciprocal-space formulation within an irreducible SO(3)-equivariant framework. By performing equivariant message passing in reciprocal space through learned equivariant k-space filters and an equivariant inverse transform, EquiEwald captures anisotropic, tensorial long-range correlations without sacrificing physical consistency. Across periodic and aperiodic benchmarks, EquiEwald captures long-range electrostatic behavior consistent with ab initio reference data and consistently improves energy and force accuracy, data efficiency, and long-range extrapolation. These results establish EquiEwald as a physically principled paradigm for long-range-capable machine-learning interatomic potentials.

AI.tldr: EquiEwald是一种将Ewald互易空间方法嵌入SO(3)等变框架的神经原子间势，解决了传统机器学习势无法处理长程静电和极化相互作用的问题。
AI.motivation: 长程静电和极化相互作用在分子和凝聚态系统中至关重要，但现有的基于局域性的机器学习原子间势无法有效处理这些相互作用。虽然现代SO(3)等变神经势在短程化学上精度很高，但不能表示各向异性、缓慢衰减的多极相关性，而现有的长程扩展要么破坏SO(3)等变性，要么无法保持能量-力的一致性。
AI.method: EquiEwald将Ewald启发的互易空间公式嵌入不可约SO(3)等变框架中。通过在互易空间中进行等变消息传递，使用学习的等变k空间滤波器和等变逆变换，从而捕获各向异性的张量长程相关性，同时保持物理一致性。
AI.result: 在周期性和非周期性基准测试中，EquiEwald能够捕获与从头算参考数据一致的长程静电行为，并持续提高能量和力的精度、数据效率以及长程外推能力。
AI.conclusion: EquiEwald为长程能力的机器学习原子间势建立了一个物理原理性的范式，解决了传统方法在长程相互作用建模上的根本局限性。

title: Optimization of all-optical phase-change waveguide devices for photonic computing from the atomic scale
summary: Photonic neuromorphic computing using chalcogenide phase-change materials (PCMs) is under active development. A key requirement is to enable as many optically programmable levels per cell as possible while maintaining relatively low optical loss. In this work, we report a combined theoretical and experimental study at the atomistic scale of a typical growth-driven PCM, Sb2Te, which reveals the unconventional optical properties of its metastable crystalline state for device design. Based on these findings, we come up with a "the shorter the better" strategy for Sb2Te-based all-optical waveguide devices, which yields a simultaneous improvement of both the programming window and the optical loss. In total, over 7-bit optical programming precision is achieved using a single waveguide cell, which is the record setting for all-optical phase-change memory devices. Our work is a typical example of the "from atom to device" scheme, which demonstrates the predictive power of in-depth atomistic understanding in guiding the design of phase-change photonic devices for improved performances.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过原子尺度理论实验结合，揭示了Sb2Te相变材料的非常规光学特性，提出"越短越好"策略，在单波导单元中实现了超过7比特的光编程精度，创下全光相变存储器件记录。
AI.motivation: 相变材料在光子神经形态计算中应用广泛，但需要实现尽可能多的光编程级别同时保持较低光学损耗。研究旨在通过原子尺度理解来指导相变光子器件的设计改进。
AI.method: 采用原子尺度的理论计算与实验研究相结合的方法，分析Sb2Te相变材料亚稳态晶态的光学特性，基于此提出"越短越好"的设计策略，应用于全光波导器件。
AI.result: 在单波导单元中实现了超过7比特（128级）的光编程精度，同时改善了编程窗口和光学损耗，创下全光相变存储器件的记录。
AI.conclusion: 研究展示了"从原子到器件"方案的典型示例，证明了深入的原子尺度理解在指导相变光子器件设计以提高性能方面的预测能力。

title: Microwave Vortex Motion Characterization of Nb$_3$Sn Coatings for Applications in High Magnetic Fields
summary: In this work, microwave measurements carried out in dielectric-loaded resonators exposed to high magnetic fields are exploited to yield the surface impedance of Nb$_3$Sn superconducting coatings deposited via two different techniques: vapor tin diffusion, and DC magnetron sputtering. The obtained data lead to qualitative interpretations on both the Nb$_3$Sn superconducting properties, and vortex-dynamics and pinning, of each coating separately, as well as simple distinctive features when comparing those. When examining the respective surface impedances at varying field, it is expected that the studied films perform at substantially diverse magnitudes of flux-flow resistivity, but also in well-differentiated pinning regimes, yet the obtained surface resistances of both samples are comparable, thus demonstrating that there is room for film optimization at the expense of certain compromise between the parameters involved.

AI.tldr: 利用微波测量分析两种不同技术制备的Nb₃Sn超导涂层的表面阻抗，比较其在强磁场下的性能差异和优化空间
AI.motivation: 研究不同制备技术（气相锡扩散和直流磁控溅射）对Nb₃Sn超导涂层性能的影响，特别是表面阻抗在强磁场下的行为，以探索薄膜优化的可能性
AI.method: 使用介电负载谐振器在强磁场下进行微波测量，获取Nb₃Sn涂层的表面阻抗数据，分析涡旋动力学和钉扎特性
AI.result: 两种薄膜表现出显著不同的磁通流电阻率和钉扎机制，但表面电阻值相近，表明存在通过参数权衡来优化薄膜性能的空间
AI.conclusion: 不同制备技术导致Nb₃Sn薄膜具有不同的超导特性和涡旋动力学行为，虽然表面电阻相近，但通过参数优化可以进一步提升性能

title: Polaron-driven switching of octupolar order in doped 5d$^2$ double perovskite
summary: We investigate how doping-induced small polarons impact the low-temperature multipolar orders of the $5d^2$ double perovskite Ba$_2$CaOsO$_6$. By computing intersite exchange interactions between 5d$^1$ localized hole polarons and 5d$^2$ magnetic ions from first principles, we demonstrate the reversal of the dominant octupolar exchange from ferromagnetic to antiferromagnetic. Solving the corresponding effective Hamiltonian we find this reversal to account for the progressive suppression of the ferro-octupolar order and the reduction of the ordering temperature upon Na doping. These findings clarify previously ambiguous experimental observations and demonstrate that charge doping in the form of small polarons offers a viable route to tuning intersite exchange interactions in spin-orbit-entangled materials, enabling the emergence of novel quantum orders.

AI.tldr: 掺杂诱导的小极化子反转了Ba₂CaOsO₆中八极交换相互作用，解释了Na掺杂对铁八极序的抑制效应
AI.motivation: 研究掺杂诱导的小极化子如何影响5d²双钙钛矿Ba₂CaOsO₆的低温多极序，澄清先前实验观察中的模糊现象
AI.method: 通过第一性原理计算5d¹局域空穴极化子与5d²磁性离子之间的位间交换相互作用，并求解相应的有效哈密顿量
AI.result: 发现八极交换相互作用从铁磁性反转为反铁磁性，这解释了Na掺杂对铁八极序的渐进抑制和有序温度的降低
AI.conclusion: 小极化子形式的电荷掺杂为调控自旋轨道纠缠材料中的位间交换相互作用提供了可行途径，能够实现新型量子序的出现

title: Fine-grained topological structures hidden in Fermi sea
summary: The geometry of Fermi sea hosts a unique form of quantum topology that governs the conductance quantization of metal and is characterized by the Euler characteristic $χ_F$, offering a new perspective in the study of topological quantum matter. Here, we discover that characterizing Fermi sea topology solely by $χ_F$ is insufficient: Fermi seas with identical $χ_F$ can exhibit fundamentally different fine-grained topological structures that cannot be connected without a Lifshitz transition. To encode this hidden structure, we introduce a structural resolution factor that captures the fine-grained Fermi sea topologies beyond $χ_F$. Considering the attractive Hubbard interaction of electrons on Fermi surfaces, we further demonstrate that the resulting topological superconducting phases can inherit the fine-grained Fermi sea topology of their normal filled bands, with differences in these structures giving rise to anomalous gapless boundary states at the interface between two metal-superconductor heterojunctions. This work opens an avenue for understanding the topological richness of Fermi sea.

AI.tldr: 费米海拓扑结构不仅由欧拉特征χ_F决定，还存在精细拓扑结构，这些结构差异影响拓扑超导相和界面态
AI.motivation: 发现仅用欧拉特征χ_F描述费米海拓扑结构不足够，相同χ_F的费米海可能存在本质不同的精细拓扑结构，这些结构差异无法通过Lifshitz转变相互连接
AI.method: 引入结构分辨率因子来编码超越χ_F的精细费米海拓扑结构；考虑费米面上电子的吸引Hubbard相互作用，研究拓扑超导相如何继承正常填充能带的精细费米海拓扑
AI.result: 拓扑超导相能够继承正常填充能带的精细费米海拓扑结构；不同精细拓扑结构在金属-超导体异质结界面处产生异常无间隙边界态
AI.conclusion: 这项工作为理解费米海的拓扑丰富性开辟了新途径，揭示了超越欧拉特征的精细拓扑结构在拓扑量子物质研究中的重要性

title: Maximum entropy distributions of wavefunctions at thermal equilibrium
summary: Statistical mechanics reveals that the properties of a macroscopic physical system emerge as an average over an ensemble of statistically independent microscopic subsystems, each occupying a specific microstate. In some models of quantum systems, these microstates are the wavefunction states of individual quantum systems.The physical principles that govern the distribution of a wavefunction ensemble, even under conditions of thermal equilibrium, are not well established. For instance, the canonical Boltzmann distribution cannot be applied to wavefunctions because they lack a definite energy. In this manuscript, we present a maximum entropy principle for the quantum wavefunction ensemble at thermal equilibrium, the so-called Scrooge ensemble. We highlight that a constraint on the energy expectation value, or even the shape of the associated eigenstate distribution, fails to yield a valid equilibrium state. We find that in addition to these constraints, one must also constrain the measurement entropy to be equal to the Rényi divergence of the ensemble with respect to the Gibbs state, indicating that the Rényi divergence may have uninvestigated physical importance to thermal equilibrium in quantum systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了量子波函数系综在热平衡下的最大熵原理（Scrooge系综），发现仅约束能量期望值或本征态分布形状不足以得到有效平衡态，必须同时约束测量熵等于系综相对于Gibbs态的Rényi散度。
AI.motivation: 统计力学表明宏观物理系统的性质是微观子系统统计系综的平均，但在量子系统中，波函数系综的分布原理（即使在热平衡条件下）尚未建立，因为波函数没有确定的能量，无法直接应用经典的Boltzmann分布。
AI.method: 提出量子波函数系综在热平衡下的最大熵原理（Scrooge系综），通过分析约束条件发现：除了能量期望值和本征态分布形状约束外，还必须约束测量熵等于系综相对于Gibbs态的Rényi散度。
AI.result: 发现仅约束能量期望值或本征态分布形状无法得到有效的量子热平衡态，必须额外约束测量熵等于Rényi散度，这表明Rényi散度在量子系统热平衡中具有尚未被充分研究的物理重要性。
AI.conclusion: 量子波函数系综的热平衡需要新的最大熵原理，其中Rényi散度作为关键约束条件，为理解量子系统的热平衡性质提供了新的理论框架。

title: Data-driven construction of machine-learning-based interatomic potentials for gas-surface scattering dynamics: the case of NO on graphite
summary: Accurate atomistic simulations of gas-surface scattering require potential energy surfaces that remain reliable over broad configurational and energetic ranges while retaining the efficiency needed for extensive trajectory sampling. Here, we develop a data-driven workflow for constructing a machine-learning interatomic potential (MLIP) tailored to gas-surface scattering dynamics, using nitric oxide (NO) scattering from highly oriented pyrolytic graphite (HOPG) as a benchmark system. Starting from an initial ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) dataset, local atomic environments are described by SOAP descriptors and analyzed in a reduced feature space obtained through principal component analysis. Farthest point sampling is then used to build a compact training set, and the resulting Deep Potential model is refined through a query-by-committee active-learning strategy using additional configurations extracted from molecular dynamics simulations over extended ranges of incident energies and surface temperatures. The final MLIP reproduces reference energies and forces with high fidelity and enables large-scale molecular dynamics simulations of NO scattering from graphite at a computational cost far below that of AIMD. The simulations provide detailed insight into adsorption energetics, trapping versus direct scattering probabilities, translational energy loss, angular distributions, and rotational excitation. Overall, the results reproduce the main experimental trends and demonstrate that descriptor-guided sampling combined with active learning offers an efficient and transferable strategy for constructing MLIPs for gas-surface interactions.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于机器学习的原子间势能面构建工作流，用于气体-表面散射动力学模拟，以NO在石墨表面的散射为基准系统，通过主动学习策略构建高效准确的势能面。
AI.motivation: 气体-表面散射的精确原子模拟需要既可靠又高效的势能面，传统从头算分子动力学计算成本过高，难以进行大规模轨迹采样。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的工作流：1) 使用SOAP描述符描述局部原子环境，通过主成分分析降维；2) 使用最远点采样构建紧凑训练集；3) 采用Deep Potential模型，通过查询委员会主动学习策略从扩展能量和温度范围的分子动力学模拟中提取额外配置进行优化。
AI.result: 最终MLIP能够高保真地复现参考能量和力，计算成本远低于从头算分子动力学，成功模拟了NO在石墨表面的吸附能、捕获与直接散射概率、平动能损失、角度分布和转动激发等动力学过程。
AI.conclusion: 描述符引导采样结合主动学习为构建气体-表面相互作用的机器学习原子间势能面提供了一种高效且可转移的策略，能够复现主要实验趋势。

title: On the origin of non-Arrhenius behavior of grain growth
summary: Non-Arrhenius grain growth has been observed in a range of polycrystalline materials; however, its fundamental mechanisms, particularly whether the process is thermally activated or exhibits anti-thermally activation, remain controversial. In this study, SrTiO3 was employed as a model system to systematically investigate non-Arrhenius grain growth behavior through combined experimental and theoretical approaches, utilizing a newly developed grain growth model. The results reveal that non-Arrhenius grain growth is a thermally activated process without a definitive characteristic temperature, which is primarily controlled by the interplay between temperature-dependent factors and the temperature-independent parameters such as grain size and its distribution. Moreover, during abnormal grain growth (AGG), the non-Arrhenius behavior of grain growth primarily occurs at lower temperatures and gradually transitions to Arrhenius-type behavior as the temperature increases.

AI.tldr: SrTiO3作为模型系统研究非阿伦尼乌斯晶粒生长，发现该过程是热激活的，无确定特征温度，主要受温度相关因素与晶粒尺寸等温度无关参数共同控制。
AI.motivation: 多种多晶材料中观察到非阿伦尼乌斯晶粒生长现象，但其基本机制（特别是该过程是热激活还是反热激活）存在争议，需要系统研究澄清。
AI.method: 以SrTiO3为模型系统，结合实验和理论方法，利用新开发的晶粒生长模型系统研究非阿伦尼乌斯晶粒生长行为。
AI.result: 非阿伦尼乌斯晶粒生长是热激活过程，无确定特征温度，主要受温度相关因素与晶粒尺寸及其分布等温度无关参数共同控制；异常晶粒生长时，非阿伦尼乌斯行为主要发生在低温，随温度升高逐渐转变为阿伦尼乌斯型行为。
AI.conclusion: 非阿伦尼乌斯晶粒生长本质上是热激活过程，其行为由温度相关和温度无关参数的相互作用决定，在异常晶粒生长中表现出温度依赖的转变特征。

title: Tackling the Sign Problem in the Doped Hubbard Model with Normalizing Flows
summary: The Hubbard model at finite chemical potential is a cornerstone for understanding doped correlated systems, but simulations are severely limited by the sign problem. In the auxiliary-field formulation, the spin basis mitigates the sign problem, yet severe ergodicity issues have limited its use. We extend recent advances with normalizing flows at half-filling to finite chemical potential by introducing an annealing scheme enabling ergodic sampling. Compared to state-of-the-art hybrid Monte Carlo in the charge basis, our approach accurately reproduces exact diagonalization results while reducing statistical uncertainties by an order of magnitude, opening a new path for simulations of doped correlated systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于归一化流和退火方案的辅助场量子蒙特卡洛方法，用于解决有限化学势下Hubbard模型的符号问题和遍历性问题，相比传统方法显著降低了统计不确定性。
AI.motivation: 有限化学势下的Hubbard模型是理解掺杂关联系统的基石，但模拟受到符号问题的严重限制。在辅助场表述中，自旋基虽然缓解了符号问题，但严重的遍历性问题限制了其应用。
AI.method: 将半填充条件下的归一化流方法扩展到有限化学势，引入退火方案以实现遍历采样。相比电荷基中的最先进混合蒙特卡洛方法，该方法能准确再现精确对角化结果。
AI.result: 与最先进的混合蒙特卡洛方法相比，该方法准确再现了精确对角化结果，同时将统计不确定性降低了一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为掺杂关联系统的模拟开辟了新途径，通过结合归一化流和退火方案，有效解决了有限化学势下Hubbard模型的符号问题和遍历性问题。

title: Boltzmann-Bloch Equation Approach to the Theory of the Optical Inter- and Intraband Response in Noble Metals
summary: In this paper we introduce momentum-resolved metal Boltzmann-Bloch equations (MBBE) for the combined description of electronic intra- and interband processes in noble metals. This microscopic framework incorporates a full treatment of many-body electron-electron and electron-phonon interactions, relevant for relaxation and dephasing processes after optical excitation. For the example of gold, we calculate the linear optical response for near-infrared and visible energies. This provides insight into the interplay of microscopic processes hidden in phenomenological Drude-Lorentz models. The complex geometry of the Fermi surface is treated by an anisotropic electronic dispersion model, which is necessary to explain the temperature dependent spectrum over the whole frequency range of intra- and interband transitions.

AI.tldr: 提出动量分辨金属玻尔兹曼-布洛赫方程（MBBE），用于描述贵金属中电子带内和带间过程，结合多体电子-电子和电子-声子相互作用，以金为例计算近红外和可见光区的线性光学响应。
AI.motivation: 传统Drude-Lorentz模型是唯象的，无法揭示微观过程的相互作用。需要建立微观框架来同时描述电子带内和带间过程，并包含多体相互作用，以更准确地解释贵金属的光学响应。
AI.method: 提出动量分辨金属玻尔兹曼-布洛赫方程（MBBE），该框架包含完整的电子-电子和电子-声子多体相互作用处理。采用各向异性电子色散模型处理费米面的复杂几何结构，以金为例计算近红外和可见光区的线性光学响应。
AI.result: 成功计算了金在近红外和可见光区的线性光学响应，揭示了微观过程在唯象Drude-Lorentz模型中隐藏的相互作用。各向异性电子色散模型能够解释整个频率范围内（包括带内和带间跃迁）的温度依赖光谱。
AI.conclusion: MBBE框架为贵金属的光学响应提供了微观描述，超越了传统的唯象模型。该方法能够揭示微观过程的相互作用，并解释温度依赖的光谱特性，为理解贵金属的光学性质提供了更深入的理论基础。

title: Derivative Discontinuity in Many-Body Perturbation Theory and Chemical Potentials in Random Phase Approximation
summary: We derive analytical expressions for chemical potentials within the random phase approximation (RPA), equivalently the $GW$ energy functional evaluated using non interacting Green's functions ($G_s$). The chemical potential is obtained using two formally equivalent approaches: a direct derivative of the total energy with respect to particle number, and a functional derivative via the chain rule through $G_s$, both validated with finite difference benchmarks. We show that the functional derivative of the $GW$ correlation energy$\unicode{x2013}$i.e., the $GW$ correlation self energy$\unicode{x2013}$exhibits a discontinuity at integer particle numbers with finite jumps. This resolves the apparent inconsistency between accurate $GW$ quasiparticle energies and the large delocalization errors observed in RPA total energies, as standard $GW$ self energies neglect this nonanalytic behavior. Our results suggest that derivative discontinuities are a fundamental feature of correlation energy functionals, analogous to the known discontinuity in the exact exchange correlation energy.

AI.tldr: 该论文推导了随机相位近似（RPA）下化学势的解析表达式，揭示了GW关联能泛函导数在整数粒子数处存在不连续性，这解释了GW准粒子能量准确性与RPA总能量中较大离域误差之间的不一致性。
AI.motivation: 解决GW准粒子能量计算准确性与RPA总能量中观察到的较大离域误差之间的明显不一致性。标准GW自能计算忽略了泛函导数的非解析行为，导致理论与实际观测之间的差异。
AI.method: 使用两种形式等价的方法推导化学势：1）总能量对粒子数的直接导数；2）通过非相互作用格林函数Gs的链式法则进行泛函导数。两种方法都通过有限差分基准测试进行了验证。
AI.result: 发现GW关联能泛函导数（即GW关联自能）在整数粒子数处表现出不连续性，存在有限跳跃。这种导数不连续性与精确交换关联能中已知的不连续性类似，是关联能泛函的基本特征。
AI.conclusion: 导数不连续性是关联能泛函的基本特征，标准GW自能计算忽略了这种非解析行为，这解释了GW准粒子能量准确性与RPA总能量离域误差之间的不一致性。该发现对准确计算化学势和理解电子关联效应具有重要意义。

title: DeePAW: A universal machine learning model for orbital-free ab initio calculations
summary: Developing universal machine learning models for ab initio calculations is the frontier of materials cutting edge research in the new era of artificial intelligence. Here, we present the Deep Augment Way model (DeePAW) that is a universal machine learning (ML) model for orbital-free (OF) ab initio calculations, based on the density functional theory (DFT). DeePAW is currently the best OFDFT ML model according to the three criterions, 1) covering the largest number of elements, 2) having the widest application capability to diverse crystal structures, and 3) achieving the highest prediction accuracy without further fine-tuning. These scientific merits and innovations of DeePAW are stemmed from the novel SE(3)-equivariant double massage passing neuron networks. Besides predicting electron density distributions, DeePAW predicts formation energies of crystals as well and therefore paves an efficient avenue for multiscale materials modeling beyond conventional electronic structure calculation methods.

AI.tldr: DeePAW是一种用于轨道自由从头计算的通用机器学习模型，基于密度泛函理论，是目前最好的OFDFT ML模型，具有最广泛的元素覆盖、最广的晶体结构应用能力和最高的预测精度。
AI.motivation: 开发用于从头计算的通用机器学习模型是人工智能新时代材料研究的前沿。当前需要能够覆盖多种元素、适应不同晶体结构且具有高精度的轨道自由密度泛函理论机器学习模型。
AI.method: 采用新颖的SE(3)-等变双重消息传递神经网络架构，能够预测电子密度分布和晶体形成能，为多尺度材料建模提供高效途径。
AI.result: DeePAW是目前最好的OFDFT ML模型：1)覆盖元素数量最多，2)对多样晶体结构的应用能力最广，3)无需进一步微调即可达到最高预测精度。
AI.conclusion: DeePAW为超越传统电子结构计算方法的多尺度材料建模开辟了高效途径，其科学价值和创新源于SE(3)-等变双重消息传递神经网络架构。

title: Symmetric Mass Generation in a Bilayer Honeycomb Lattice with $\mathrm{SU}(2)\times\mathrm{SU}(2)\times\mathrm{SU}(2)/\mathbb{Z}_2$ Symmetry
summary: Symmetric mass generation (SMG) is a mechanism for generating mass gaps in fermionic systems without breaking any symmetries or developing topological order, challenging the conventional Landau paradigm. In this Letter, we provide numerically exact evidence for SMG in (2+1) dimensions through large-scale determinant quantum Monte Carlo (DQMC) simulations of a bilayer honeycomb lattice model with $\mathrm{SU}(2)\times\mathrm{SU}(2)\times\mathrm{SU}(2)/\mathbb{Z}_2$ symmetry. We observe the simultaneous opening of single-particle and bosonic gaps at a critical coupling $J_c \approx 2.6$ with correlation length exponent $ν= 1.14(2)$, while an exhaustive search over all 19 symmetry-inequivalent fermion bilinear order parameters confirms the absence of any symmetry breaking. We estimate the fermion anomalous dimension to be $η_ψ= 0.071(1)$, which deviates significantly from the large-$N$ prediction ($η_ψ\approx 0.595$) and variational Monte Carlo estimates ($η_ψ\approx 0.62$), pointing to a distinct universality class. By contrasting with a related $\mathrm{Spin}(5)\times\mathrm{U}(1)/\mathbb{Z}_2$ model that develops an intermediate excitonic phase, we demonstrate the crucial role of pure non-Abelian symmetry in prohibiting bilinear condensates and enforcing the direct SMG transition.

AI.tldr: 通过大规模DQMC模拟双层蜂窝晶格模型，首次在(2+1)维提供了对称质量生成(SMG)的数值精确证据，发现单粒子和玻色子能隙同时打开，但无任何对称性破缺。
AI.motivation: 对称质量生成(SMG)是一种在不破坏对称性或产生拓扑序的情况下产生费米子系统质量间隙的机制，挑战了传统的朗道范式。需要在(2+1)维中提供数值证据来验证这一机制。
AI.method: 使用大规模行列式量子蒙特卡洛(DQMC)模拟具有SU(2)×SU(2)×SU(2)/Z₂对称性的双层蜂窝晶格模型。对所有19个对称不等价的费米子双线性序参数进行穷举搜索，并与相关的Spin(5)×U(1)/Z₂模型进行对比。
AI.result: 在临界耦合J_c≈2.6处观察到单粒子和玻色子能隙同时打开，关联长度指数ν=1.14(2)。确认无任何对称性破缺。费米子反常维度η_ψ=0.071(1)，显著偏离大N预测(≈0.595)和变分蒙特卡洛估计(≈0.62)，表明属于不同的普适类。
AI.conclusion: 首次在(2+1)维提供了SMG的数值精确证据，证明了纯非阿贝尔对称性在禁止双线性凝聚和强制执行直接SMG转变中的关键作用，为超越朗道范式的量子相变提供了新范例。

title: Peltier cooling in Corbino-geometry quantum Hall systems
summary: Quantum Hall systems having Corbino geometry are expected to have a large Peltier coefficient $Π_{rr}$ in the quantum Hall plateau region.
